meta.title: Pepi's Landhaus | Tannheimer Tal
meta.description: Pepi's Landhaus - Your exclusive holiday retreat in the Tannheimer Tal. Luxury holiday apartments with alpine charm and modern comfort.
hero.title: Pepi's Landhaus
hero.tagline: Luxury holiday apartments with alpine charm amidst the Tyrolean mountains
welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.text1: Pepi's Landhaus combines traditional Tyrolean architecture with modern comfort. Our historic country house in the heart of the Tannheimer Tal has been lovingly renovated and offers exclusive holiday apartments at the highest level.
welcome.text2: Massive wooden beams, warm natural materials and a breathtaking view of the surrounding mountain landscape create an atmosphere where you can forget everyday life and truly unwind.
welcome.stat1.label: Holiday apartments
welcome.stat2.label: Guests maximum
welcome.stat3.label: Days season
rooms.label: Accommodation
rooms.subtitle: Each of our holiday apartments combines alpine charm with modern comfort — furnished with natural materials and great attention to detail.
rooms.room1.name: Alpine Panorama Suite
rooms.room1.description: Spacious suite with exposed wooden beams, open living area and breathtaking mountain views. Ideal for couples and families.
rooms.room2.name: Tyrolean Stube
rooms.room2.description: Traditionally furnished apartment with handcrafted wooden furniture and cosy tiled stove flair. Authentic and comfortable.
rooms.room3.name: Bergkristall
rooms.room3.description: Bright, modern holiday apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows and contemporary design. The perfect retreat.
rooms.room4.name: Enzian Apartment
rooms.room4.description: Compact apartment for nature-loving guests. Functionally furnished with all the comfort for an unforgettable stay.
experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Summer or winter — the Tannheimer Tal offers unforgettable experiences for nature lovers and active holidaymakers in every season.
experiences.exp1.title: Skiing & Snowboarding
experiences.exp1.description: First-class ski resorts right on your doorstep. The Tannheimer Tal offers perfect slopes for beginners and experts alike.
experiences.exp2.title: Hiking & Mountain Tours
experiences.exp2.description: Over 300 km of marked hiking trails through the spectacular mountain landscape of the Tannheim Mountains.
experiences.exp3.title: Cuisine & Indulgence
experiences.exp3.description: Traditional Tyrolean cuisine and regional specialities in the inns and alpine huts of the surrounding area.
experiences.exp4.title: Relaxation & Wellness
experiences.exp4.description: Relax in nature. Peaceful walks, yoga in the green and healing mountain air for body and soul.
gallery.label: Impressions
gallery.title: Moments at the Landhaus
location.label: Getting here
location.subtitle: Nestled in the picturesque landscape of the Tannheimer Tal, you can reach us easily from Munich, Innsbruck or Zurich.

chat.title: Pepi's Landhaus
chat.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
chat.greeting: Welcome! How can I help you? Choose a question or write to us.
chat.noMatch: Unfortunately, we don't have an automatic answer to this question. Please contact us directly at info@pepis-landhaus.at or call us at +43 (0) 5675 XXXXX.
chat.faq1.a: Pepi's Landhaus is located in the beautiful Tannheimer Tal in Tyrol, Austria. From Munich you can reach us in about 2 hours, from Innsbruck in 1.5 hours and from Zurich in about 3 hours.
chat.faq2.a: You can book directly through our website — simply use the booking form at the top of the page. We are also bookable via Booking.com or Tannheimertal.com. For the best prices, we recommend direct booking!
chat.faq3.a: We offer 4 unique holiday apartments: the Alpine Panorama Suite (65 m²), the Tyrolean Stube (55 m²), Bergkristall (50 m²) and the Enzian Apartment (40 m²). All are furnished with natural materials and great attention to detail.
chat.faq4.a: Yes, dogs are very welcome! Please mention this when booking so we can prepare everything for your four-legged friend.
chat.faq5.a: The Tannheimer Tal offers year-round activities: skiing and snowboarding in winter, hiking and mountain tours in summer. Lake Haldensee is just 8 minutes away, ski resorts 3 minutes, and restaurants only 2 minutes. Over 300 km of marked hiking trails await you!
chat.faq6.a: Yes, free parking spaces are available directly at the house for our guests.
chat.faq7.q: What are the check-in / check-out times?
chat.faq7.a: Check-in is from 3:00 PM, check-out until 10:00 AM. Earlier check-in or later check-out is possible subject to availability — just let us know!
chat.faq8.a: Yes, free high-speed WiFi is available in all holiday apartments and throughout the house.
